Package io.vertigo.ui.impl.quasar.tree

Class Tree

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.ui.impl.quasar.tree.Tree
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class Tree extends Object implements Serializable
Use with Quasar QTree component https://quasar.dev/vue-components/tree/
